headline: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Silversea Cruises/
summary: Silversea, the leading experiential luxury and expedition travel brand, has unveiled its World Cruise 2029, A Pacific Awakening. Sailing from San Diego on January 5, 2029, the 125‑day odyssey on board the intimate Silver Whisper will take guests through the world's largest ocean, exploring more than 60 destinations in 19 countries – with six signature events and one included overland experience. Guided by themes of wonder, wayfinding, and cultural awakening, the voyage spans Polynesia, Micronesi
